title: ApprovalArtifactPayload
description: Payload for approval_artifact family v1. Captures the explicit operator approval or rejection decision for a pending execution request that required explicit_operator_approval posture.

request_id.description: UUID of the original execution request this decision covers.

correlation_id.description: Lineage correlation UUID spanning the full execution chain.

approval_decision.description: Explicit operator decision. Must be unambiguous — no pending or ambiguous states allowed in this artifact.

decided_by.description: Identity of the operator who made the decision.

decided_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the decision was made.

decision_summary.description: Plain-language summary of the approval decision for audit and review surfaces.

operator_notes.description: Optional detailed operator notes accompanying the decision.

reviewed_execution_plan_id.description: Optional UUID of the specific execution plan reviewed before deciding.
